title: ソリューション／勝ちたい

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow, everyone came to watch!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Race estimated to begin in five, four, three, two—

Mejiro McQueen sprints out the moment the
gates open.
Yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Rice. Would you like to observe an
on-campus scrimmage with me tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's a high-level, long-distance scrimmage
between runners active in classic- and senior-year
graded races.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, the favorite to win the spring
Tenno Sho, will be running.

Mejiro McQueen is a genteel Umamusume who
carries the weight and responsibility of the Mejiro
family on her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Research is essential if you wish to win. Observing
this scrimmage will be beneficial for you as well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but why do you want to watch it with me?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...? That is because...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I cannot explain it well, but perhaps it is because I
am feeling "restless."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe I am experiencing the same "desire to
win" regarding the spring Tenno Sho as you are.
Ka-thunk!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the race begins! Wow! Looking at the size of
the crowd today, you'd never think it was a mere
scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: McQueen Fan A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: McQueen Fan B
text_block_list.text:
There's no way she's losing this! She's got it in the
bag!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on the enthusiasm of the spectators'
cheers, I have verified Mejiro McQueen's
exceptional popularity among fans.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! The front of the pack has hit the
curve and is heading into the fourth corner!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Just who will get there first?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hah!

Mejiro McQueen pulls away from the group and
swiftly widens the gap between her and the
second-place runner.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon and Rice
text_block_list.text: Amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

In a show of overwhelming skill, Mejiro McQueen
flies past the goal.

text_block_list.name: McQueen Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that?! She won by a whole seven
lengths! McQueen is seriously something else!

text_block_list.name: McQueen Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I could watch her run full-throttle like that
anytime, anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your words of praise. I'm honored
to receive them.

text_block_list.name: McQueen Fans
text_block_list.text: Woooooh!

Mejiro McQueen's elegant smile elicits even more
excitement from the crowd around her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: McQueen was u-unbelievable... Wow!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I concur. She possesses a great degree of skill and
an air of elegance to match.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I can actually beat her...

Rice Shower shrinks in on herself dejectedly after
witnessing such an amazing display of running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
She is indeed spectacular. However, I am still
feeling the "desire to win."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So you really do want to win!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I was surprised when you said you
wanted to win the spring Tenno Sho yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You've... never really acted like that before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is accurate. I have certainly undergone some
changes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
For reasons I cannot explain, certain memories
keep returning to me unbidden from time to
time...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Memories of the "restlessness" I felt at the Kikuka
Sho and your incredible show of power during the
race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It has taken me some time to accept it. But now...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My "desire to win" has become a solid source of
power for me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you feel that way from running with me?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's why I want to win the spring Tenno Sho... or rather, that is why I will win it.

Impressed by Mihono Bourbon's growth, Rice
Shower gives a small nod.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I see. I understand now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to win too. No, I don't just want to win. I will win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So, um, I'll see you at the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative. I will see you there.
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, pant!

Mihono Bourbon's running form has stabilized and
returned to normal.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hah!
I feel like she's somehow gotten even better!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Lap time stability confirmed. I apologize for
having caused you so much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... There is something I must report. Or,
more accurately, there is something I must confer
with you about.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I originally experienced "discomfort" regarding
my "desire to win"...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, now that I comprehend what it is, I find
surrendering myself to this capricious emotion to
be quite comforting.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is all I wished to confer with you about. I will
now proceed to the next segment of my training
regimen.

Mihono Bourbon has acquired a useful weapon
that will help her prepare for the spring Tenno
Sho.

She's taken another step forward in her growth,
and continues to race toward greater heights!
